name: @pryzm/editor-ui
description: PRYZM 3 — Editor-UI public API contracts (Sprint F-2.4/F-2.5). Type-only interfaces for InspectModeCoordinator, PreviewManager, DataWorkbench, and the initUI function surface. Sprint F-2.5: IInitUIParams narrowed — runtime PryzmRuntime|null, viewController IViewController.

pryzm.note: Sprint F-2.4 (2026-05-15): Editor-UI public API surface. Sprint F-2.5 (2026-05-15): Added @pryzm/runtime-composer + @pryzm/views deps; IInitUIParams.runtime narrowed to PryzmRuntime|null; IInitUIParams.viewController narrowed to IViewController (imported from @pryzm/views, which is now the canonical home after F-2.5 migration). Roadmap: 51-POST-EXTRACTION-ROADMAP.md §Phase F-2.
